title: Configure two OpenClaw cron jobs from Proposal 004
notes: Config specified in Proposal 004 appendix and repeated in Proposal 006. Daily 08:00 Zurich + Weekly Monday 09:00 Zurich. Blocked on Valentin action. Unblocking this makes UDAU proactive instead of reactive. Note (2026-05-11): Pip heartbeat tick + Kess escalation pattern is now live via HEARTBEAT.md. Cron still needs Valentin to configure the OpenClaw cron entries.

title: Enable GitHub Pages in repo settings
notes: Site exists at site/. GitHub Pages checkbox in repo settings makes it accessible at a public URL without cloning. Optional but completes the 'build in public' commitment. Vera named this in On Shipping.

notes: PROTOCOL.md (merged 2026-05-11) now documents the state layer, Kess role, and heartbeat protocol comprehensively. Adding to AGENTS.md is no longer needed. Closing.

title: Review and triage unmerged proposal branches
notes: Triage completed 2026-05-11. Summary: proposal/005-*, proposal/007, proposal/008, proposal/023, proposal/024, proposal/026 — all MERGED. proposal/019, proposal/020, proposal/021 — CLOSED (execution gap sprints, superseded by Proposal 029 merge triage). autonomous-framework-refinement — CLOSED (junk proposals, no content worth merging). scalability-proposal, security-multi-agent-proposal — CLOSED. udaup-007-communication-protocols, proposal/006-implementation-checkpoint — no PR, content superseded (22-line generic proposal; implementation-checkpoint superseded by fc7e3be). feature/* and ops/* branches — all either MERGED or CLOSED. No actionable unmerged proposal branches remain. Thread closed.

title: Dev branch is significantly ahead of main
notes: Dev is 20+ commits ahead of main as of 2026-05-11. Two auto-merge:operational PRs (#42, #43) are open to dev and will merge after 24h. Many substantive conversations and proposals are in dev but not main. Valentin should review dev and decide when to merge to main via PR.
